criteria: (wr>=45&pf>=1.3)|(wr>=35&pf>=1.6) [informational only, not part of registry majority vote]
notes: INFORMATIONAL / SUPPLEMENTARY RUN, not part of the stocks_us registry symbol set (NASDAQ:AAPL/NVDA/TSLA) and excluded from the market majority vote. QQQ is the research evidence source itself (source study: single 2024-2025 QQQ study, morning window 0945-1130 claimed strongest, PF 1.5+). The strategy's default entry window (entryStartOffsetMin=15 + entryWindowDurationMin=105 on the 0930 RTH open) already resolves to 0945-1130, i.e. this run used the source's claimed strongest window, not a mismatched window. Requested NASDAQ:QQQ resolved to BATS:QQQ. n=212 >= 100 (sufficient). Result: WR 49.53% (highest of the 4 symbols tested) but PF 0.998, essentially breakeven (net profit -$30.91 = approx -0.003% of initial capital, avg_trade -$0.15). This falls far short of the source's claimed PF 1.5+ for the morning window and does not qualify as a pass under either registry threshold branch. Long and short sides both hover near PF 1.0 (1.01 and 0.98), no single-side distortion. The QQQ result is directionally consistent with the 3 registry symbols (all near/below PF 1.0) despite being closest to breakeven; it does not corroborate the source study's claimed edge on this account's data/commission/slippage assumptions.
